Interface ReactorServiceInstanceLoadBalancer

All Superinterfaces:
ReactiveLoadBalancer<ServiceInstance>, ReactorLoadBalancer<ServiceInstance>
All Known Implementing Classes:
RandomLoadBalancer, RoundRobinLoadBalancer
public interface ReactorServiceInstanceLoadBalancer extends ReactorLoadBalancer<ServiceInstance>
A marker interface for ReactorLoadBalancer that allows selecting ServiceInstance objects.
Since:
2.2.0
Author:
Olga Maciaszek-Sharma
